titel: Joint statement from the European Union's High Representative, Josep Borrell, and Commissioners Elisa Ferreira and Jutta Urpilainen regarding the devastating earthquakes in Venezuela.
html:
Statement from the European Commission Brussels, June 25, 2026

The European Union expresses its deepest condolences to the families and loved ones of those who lost their lives in the devastating earthquakes that have struck Venezuela. In this difficult time, the European Union wishes to express its solidarity with the people of Venezuela and with all those involved in rescue and relief efforts.
tldr: The EU expresses its deep support and sympathy to the people of Venezuela following the devastating earthquakes. They want to demonstrate that they stand with the country during this difficult time.
lattlast:
The European Union, a collaboration between many European countries, has issued an official statement regarding the severe earthquakes in Venezuela. They express their sorrow for those who have been injured or killed in the disaster.

The EU wants to demonstrate its concern for the people of Venezuela and for all those working to save lives and assist those affected. This is a way for the EU to show solidarity, meaning that they stand with the country during this difficult time.

The statement comes from the highest leadership within the European Commission, which is the part of the EU responsible for its day-to-day operations and decisions. They want to reach out to families and those affected to show them that they are not alone.
